records.ety: [L., from Gr. <?/, fr. <?/ to yoke, join. See Yoke.]

defs: A figure by which an adjective or verb, which agrees with a nearer word, is, by way of supplement, referred also to another more remote; as, “hic illius arma, hic currus fuit;” where fuit, which agrees directly with currus, is referred also to arma.
